name: mach
desc: Mach is a fast, reliable, and extensible web fuzzing tool built for security researchers, bug bounty hunters, and penetration testers. Designed with performanc…
descFull: Mach is a fast, reliable, and extensible web fuzzing tool built for security researchers, bug bounty hunters, and penetration testers. Designed with performance and simplicity in mind, it helps uncover hidden endpoints across modern web applications.
